methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 24 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Evolv Technology is a public-stage defense and security company (NASDAQ: EVLV) that has raised over $400M to date. The comparable universe in Defense & Security consists of 2 public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private companies, including Anduril Industries, Saronic, Flock Safety, Shield AI, and Chaos Industries. However, the peer set presents a methodological constraint: no sufficiently narrow cohort exists within same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier filters to support a reliable peer-median approach.

Given Evolv's public listing status and the fragmentation of the Defense & Security peer landscape, traditional valuation triangulation methods face structural limitations. The identified 24 same-sector peers lack density in tightly comparable buckets; applying an all-sector median would sacrifice analytical precision without adding confidence. The 2 public comps and 8 private peers span heterogeneous business models, geographies, and maturity profiles, making direct multiple application difficult without introducing noise.

The absence of a defensible peer-median result underscores the need for alternative approaches—fundamental DCF modeling tied to Evolv's specific revenue trajectory and margin profile, or scenario-weighted analysis anchored to disclosed financial metrics—rather than reliance on comp multiples. Key uncertainties include the degree of product-market fit in core verticals and near-term profitability pathway. Market participants should prioritize granular operational and financial disclosure to reduce valuation ambiguity in this fragmented sector.
